ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the track is popular */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "genre_id" TEXT /* ID of the genre */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track the audio features belong to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the track */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or description of the user */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings (public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting (public, private) */,
  "number_of_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the track belongs to */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "listened_at" TEXT /* Date the track was first listened to */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been listened to */,
  "last_listened_at" TEXT /* Date the track was last listened to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the artist */,
  "number_of_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date the follow relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "following_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the playlist */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the playlist was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_shares_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)
